remarks: Discover exceptional modern living in this stunning new construction home set on 1.68 acres of private, serene property in Westport, CT. Designed with both luxury and functionality in mind, this residence offers 5 spacious bedrooms and 7 beautifully appointed bathrooms. The primary suite is a true sanctuary, featuring three generous closets and a spa-inspired feel. Each additional bedroom is thoughtfully designed with ample space and comfort. Upstairs, a bright and inviting sitting area creates the perfect retreat, while a fully finished attic provides an ideal space for a playroom or creative zone. The heart of the home is a chef's kitchen, showcasing elegant oak cabinetry, high-end finishes, and a large walk-in pantry-perfect for everyday living and entertaining alike. A dedicated home office on the main level adds convenience for today's lifestyle. The fully finished basement offers incredible versatility, ideal for a home gym, bar, or entertainment space. Step outside to a beautiful, expansive patio overlooking the private grounds-perfect for gatherings or quiet relaxation. Completing this remarkable home is a 3-car garage and a sleek, modern design throughout. This is a rare opportunity to own a truly special property that combines sophistication, space, and privacy in one of Westport's most desirable locations.
